scripts.test: bun test ./packages/*/tests && for d in examples/*/; do if [ -d "$d/test" ]; then (cd "$d" && bun test) || exit 1; fi; done
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run check:readme-tags && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: tsgo -p packages/abide/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/abide/tsconfig.consumer.json && tsgo -p packages/prettier-plugin-abide/tsconfig.json && bun run typecheck:abide
scripts.bench: for f in packages/abide/bench/*.bench.ts; do bun "$f"; done
scripts.version-packages: bun run scripts/autofillChangesets.ts && changeset version && bun run scripts/syncRootChangelog.ts
